Skip to content
You said:
help me design a modern website from scratch for my company called Seifert Sites. Here is the logo. Im going for an Apple type vibe. I also want a paralax background. i included the background as well.
ChatGPT said:

Bet. Here’s a clean “Apple-ish” one-page site you can drop into a fresh Next.js project from scratch, with your logo + your dark geometric background and a smooth parallax effect (doesn’t block content).

1) Put your images in the right place

In your project root, put these files here:

  • public/logo.png → your Seifert Sites Logo.png

  • public/bg.png → your background image

So your folder looks like:

  • public/logo.png

  • public/bg.png

(Keep the names simple like that so imports don’t get annoying.)

2) Create this file: app/page.tsx

This is a full modern landing page + parallax background + Apple-style “glass” sections + orange accents.

tsx
// app/page.tsx
"use client";

import Image from "next/image";
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";

function usePrefersReducedMotion() {
  const [reduced, setReduced] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    const mq = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)");
    const onChange = () => setReduced(mq.matches);
    onChange();
    mq.addEventListener?.("change", onChange);
    return () => mq.removeEventListener?.("change", onChange);
  }, []);
  return reduced;
}

export default function Page() {
  const prefersReducedMotion = usePrefersReducedMotion();
  const [scrollY, setScrollY] = useState(0);
  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onScroll = () => {
      if (rafRef.current) return;
      rafRef.current = window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        setScrollY(window.scrollY || 0);
        rafRef.current = null;
      });
    };
    window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
    onScroll();
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("scroll", onScroll);
      if (rafRef.current) cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  const parallax = useMemo(() => {
    if (prefersReducedMotion) return 0;
    // keep it subtle so it feels premium
    return Math.min(scrollY * 0.18, 160);
  }, [scrollY, prefersReducedMotion]);

  return (
    <div className="wrap">
      {/* Parallax background layer */}
      <div
        className="bg"
        aria-hidden="true"
        style={{
          transform: `translate3d(0, ${parallax}px, 0) scale(1.06)`,
        }}
      >
        <Image
          src="/bg.png"
          alt=""
          fill
          priority
          sizes="100vw"
          style={{ objectFit: "cover" }}
        />
        <div className="bgOverlay" />
        <div className="vignette" />
      </div>

      {/* Top nav */}
      <header className="nav">
        <div className="navInner">
          <div className="brand">
            <div className="brandMark">
              <Image
                src="/logo.png"
                alt="Seifert Sites logo"
                width={34}
                height={34}
                priority
              />
            </div>
            <span className="brandName">Seifert Sites</span>
          </div>

          <nav className="navLinks">
            <a href="#services">Services</a>
            <a href="#work">Work</a>
            <a href="#process">Process</a>
            <a href="#pricing">Pricing</a>
          </nav>

          <a className="navCta" href="#contact">
            Book a call
          </a>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="content">
        {/* HERO */}
        <section className="hero">
          <div className="heroGrid">
            <div className="heroLeft">
              <div className="chip">
                <span className="dot" />
                <span>Web design & development • fast • modern • conversion-first</span>
              </div>

              <h1 className="h1">
                Premium websites that look expensive <span className="accent">and</span> convert.
              </h1>

              <p className="sub">
                I build clean, high-performance sites with that Apple-level polish—smooth motion,
                crisp typography, and a vibe that makes people trust you instantly.
              </p>

              <div className="heroBtns">
                <a className="btnPrimary" href="#contact">
                  Get a quote
                </a>
                <a className="btnGhost" href="#work">
                  See examples
                </a>
              </div>

              <div className="heroStats">
                <div className="stat">
                  <div className="statNum">3–7 days</div>
                  <div className="statLabel">typical turnaround</div>
                </div>
                <div className="stat">
                  <div className="statNum">90+</div>
                  <div className="statLabel">PageSpeed score target</div>
                </div>
                <div className="stat">
                  <div className="statNum">SEO-ready</div>
                  <div className="statLabel">launch checklist included</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="heroRight">
              <div className="glassCard">
                <div className="cardTop">
                  <div className="miniBrand">
                    <Image src="/logo.png" alt="" width={28} height={28} />
                    <div>
                      <div className="miniTitle">Seifert Sites</div>
                      <div className="miniSub">Design that feels inevitable.</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="pill">Live preview</div>
                </div>

                <div className="mock">
                  <div className="mockBar">
                    <span />
                    <span />
                    <span />
                  </div>
                  <div className="mockBody">
                    <div className="mockLine w70" />
                    <div className="mockLine w55" />
                    <div className="mockLine w85" />
                    <div className="mockTiles">
                      <div className="tile" />
                      <div className="tile" />
                      <div className="tile" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="mockLine w60" />
                    <div className="mockLine w40" />
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="cardBottom">
                  <div className="badge">
                    <span className="badgeGlow" />
                    <span>Dark mode aesthetics</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="badge">
                    <span className="badgeGlow" />
                    <span>Subtle motion</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="badge">
                    <span className="badgeGlow" />
                    <span>Conversion layout</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="heroNote">
                Orange accents = attention magnets. Used sparingly so it feels “luxury,” not “gaming PC.”
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* SERVICES */}
        <section id="services" className="section">
          <div className="sectionHead">
            <h2 className="h2">Services</h2>
            <p className="muted">
              The goal is simple: make your business look trustworthy in 3 seconds.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="cards">
            <div className="card">
              <h3>Design + Build</h3>
              <p>
                Custom design, responsive layout, animations that feel smooth (not cheesy), and a
                build that loads fast.
              </p>
              <ul>
                <li>Modern landing pages</li>
                <li>Multi-page business sites</li>
                <li>Booking / lead capture</li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div className="card">
              <h3>Redesigns</h3>
              <p>
                If your site feels dated, I’ll redo it with cleaner hierarchy, better copy blocks,
                and a more premium visual system.
              </p>
              <ul>
                <li>Stronger “above the fold”</li>
                <li>Better typography</li>
                <li>Clearer CTA flow</li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div className="card">
              <h3>SEO + Launch</h3>
              <p>
                Not “magic SEO.” Just the stuff that actually matters: performance, metadata,
                structure, indexing, and a real checklist.
              </p>
              <ul>
                <li>Technical SEO setup</li>
                <li>Speed optimization</li>
                <li>Analytics + tracking</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* WORK */}
        <section id="work" className="section">
          <div className="sectionHead">
            <h2 className="h2">Work style</h2>
            <p className="muted">
              Minimal. Confident. Dark. With tiny orange sparks that guide the eye.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="split">
            <div className="panel">
              <h3>What you get</h3>
              <p>
                A site that looks like it belongs next to Apple, Tesla, or a high-end agency…
                without the agency timeline.
              </p>
              <div className="ticks">
                <div className="tick">Crisp layout + spacing</div>
                <div className="tick">Strong headline structure</div>
                <div className="tick">Polished hover + scroll motion</div>
                <div className="tick">Mobile-first done right</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="panel glowPanel">
              <h3>What I avoid</h3>
              <p>
                I’m allergic to clutter. No random gradients, no 12 fonts, no “template energy.”
                Everything has a reason.
              </p>
              <div className="ticks">
                <div className="tick">Over-designed hero sections</div>
                <div className="tick">Confusing navigation</div>
                <div className="tick">Slow animations</div>
                <div className="tick">Stock “startup” vibes</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* PROCESS */}
        <section id="process" className="section">
          <div className="sectionHead">
            <h2 className="h2">Process</h2>
            <p className="muted">Fast, clean, no drama.</p>
          </div>

          <div className="steps">
            <div className="step">
              <div className="stepNum">01</div>
              <div className="stepBody">
                <h3>Strategy</h3>
                <p>We lock the goal: calls booked, leads captured, or sales—pick one.</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="step">
              <div className="stepNum">02</div>
              <div className="stepBody">
                <h3>Design</h3>
                <p>Apple-ish layout, strong type scale, and a dark premium system.</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="step">
              <div className="stepNum">03</div>
              <div className="stepBody">
                <h3>Build + Launch</h3>
                <p>Clean code, fast load, SEO basics, and you’re live.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* PRICING */}
        <section id="pricing" className="section">
          <div className="sectionHead">
            <h2 className="h2">Pricing</h2>
            <p className="muted">Simple tiers. No weird surprises.</p>
          </div>

          <div className="pricing">
            <div className="priceCard">
              <div className="priceTop">
                <h3>Starter</h3>
                <div className="price">$$</div>
                <p className="mutedSmall">One-page landing page</p>
              </div>
              <ul>
                <li>Hero + Services + CTA</li>
                <li>Mobile-first</li>
                <li>Basic SEO</li>
              </ul>
              <a className="btnGhost full" href="#contact">Ask for a quote</a>
            </div>

            <div className="priceCard featured">
              <div className="priceTop">
                <h3>Business</h3>
                <div className="price">$$$</div>
                <p className="mutedSmall">Multi-page site</p>
              </div>
              <ul>
                <li>3–6 pages</li>
                <li>Lead capture + tracking</li>
                <li>Speed optimization</li>
              </ul>
              <a className="btnPrimary full" href="#contact">Book a call</a>
            </div>

            <div className="priceCard">
              <div className="priceTop">
                <h3>Premium</h3>
                <div className="price">$$$$</div>
                <p className="mutedSmall">Extra polish</p>
              </div>
              <ul>
                <li>Advanced motion + sections</li>
                <li>Copy help / refinement</li>
                <li>Priority turnaround</li>
              </ul>
              <a className="btnGhost full" href="#contact">Ask for a quote</a>
            </div>
          </div>

          <p className="note">
            I kept the pricing as “signals” since you didn’t give exact numbers—swap those out and
            I’ll help you word it so it feels premium instead of “cheap menu.”
          </p>
        </section>

        {/* CONTACT */}
        <section id="contact" className="section contact">
          <div className="contactInner">
            <h2 className="h2">Let’s build something that looks insane.</h2>
            <p className="muted">
              Tell me what you do, who your customer is, and what a “win” looks like for you.
            </p>

            <div className="contactGrid">
              <div className="contactCard">
                <h3>Fastest way</h3>
                <p className="mutedSmall">Book a call and I’ll send a quick plan.</p>
                <a className="btnPrimary full" href="#">
                  Add your booking link
                </a>
                <div className="tiny">Replace this button href with Calendly (or whatever).</div>
              </div>

              <div className="contactCard">
                <h3>Email</h3>
                <p className="mutedSmall">If you prefer async:</p>
                <div className="emailPill">you@seifertsites.com</div>
                <div className="tiny">Swap to your real email.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        <footer className="footer">
          <div className="footerInner">
            <div className="footBrand">
              <Image src="/logo.png" alt="" width={28} height={28} />
              <span>Seifert Sites</span>
            </div>
            <div className="footLinks">
              <a href="#services">Services</a>
              <a href="#process">Process</a>
              <a href="#pricing">Pricing</a>
            </div>
            <div className="footMeta">© {new Date().getFullYear()} Seifert Sites</div>
          </div>
        </footer>
      </main>

      <style jsx>{`
        :root {
          --bg: #07080b;
          --panel: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          --panel2: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
          --stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
          --text: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
          --muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68);
          --muted2: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.52);
          --orange: #ff7a1a;
          --orange2: #ff9a3d;
          --shadow: 0 20px 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
          --radius: 22px;
        }

        .wrap {
          min-height: 100vh;
          color: var(--text);
          background: var(--bg);
          overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        .bg {
          position: fixed;
          inset: -40px;
          z-index: 0;
          filter: saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05);
          will-change: transform;
        }

        .bgOverlay {
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: radial-gradient(
              1200px 600px at 30% 0%,
              rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.12),
              transparent 55%
            ),
            radial-gradient(
              900px 500px at 80% 30%,
              rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.10),
              transparent 55%
            ),
            linear-gradient(
              to bottom,
              rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65),
              rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.82) 40%,
              rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.92)
            );
        }

        .vignette {
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: radial-gradient(
            1200px 700px at 50% 20%,
            transparent,
            rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55) 70%,
            rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85)
          );
          pointer-events: none;
        }

        .nav {
          position: sticky;
          top: 0;
          z-index: 50;
          backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          background: rgba(7, 8, 11, 0.6);
          border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        }

        .navInner {
          max-width: 1120px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          padding: 14px 18px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: space-between;
          gap: 16px;
        }

        .brand {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          user-select: none;
        }
        .brandMark {
          width: 38px;
          height: 38px;
          display: grid;
          place-items: center;
          border-radius: 14px;
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
        }
        .brandName {
          font-weight: 650;
          letter-spacing: 0.2px;
        }

        .navLinks {
          display: flex;
          gap: 18px;
        }
        .navLinks a {
          color: var(--muted);
          text-decoration: none;
          font-size: 14px;
        }
        .navLinks a:hover {
          color: var(--text);
        }

        .navCta {
          text-decoration: none;
          font-size: 14px;
          padding: 10px 14px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.35);
          background: linear-gradient(
            180deg,
            rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18),
            rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.06)
          );
          color: var(--text);
        }
        .navCta:hover {
          border-color: rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.55);
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.10);
        }

        .content {
          position: relative;
          z-index: 2;
        }

        .hero {
          max-width: 1120px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          padding: 72px 18px 40px;
        }

        .heroGrid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 0.95fr;
          gap: 28px;
          align-items: start;
        }

        .chip {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          padding: 10px 14px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
          color: var(--muted);
          font-size: 13px;
          margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        .dot {
          width: 9px;
          height: 9px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          background: var(--orange);
          box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.65);
        }

        .h1 {
          font-size: 54px;
          line-height: 1.04;
          letter-spacing: -1.2px;
          margin: 0 0 14px;
        }
        .accent {
          color: var(--orange2);
          text-shadow: 0 0 26px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18);
        }

        .sub {
          color: var(--muted);
          font-size: 16.5px;
          line-height: 1.6;
          max-width: 54ch;
          margin: 0 0 22px;
        }

        .heroBtns {
          display: flex;
          gap: 12px;
          align-items: center;
          margin-bottom: 22px;
        }

        .btnPrimary,
        .btnGhost {
          text-decoration: none;
          display: inline-flex;
          justify-content: center;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          padding: 12px 16px;
          border-radius: 14px;
          font-weight: 650;
          letter-spacing: 0.2px;
        }

        .btnPrimary {
          background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 122, 26, 1), rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.78));
          color: #0b0c10;
          box-shadow: 0 20px 55px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.22);
        }
        .btnPrimary:hover {
          filter: brightness(1.05);
          box-shadow: 0 22px 65px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.28);
        }

        .btnGhost {
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
          color: var(--text);
        }
        .btnGhost:hover {
          border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        }

        .heroStats {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 12px;
          margin-top: 14px;
        }
        .stat {
          padding: 14px;
          border-radius: 18px;
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
        }
        .statNum {
          font-weight: 750;
          letter-spacing: -0.2px;
        }
        .statLabel {
          color: var(--muted2);
          font-size: 12.5px;
          margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .heroRight {
          display: grid;
          gap: 12px;
        }

        .glassCard {
          border-radius: var(--radius);
          background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04));
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
          box-shadow: var(--shadow);
          padding: 16px;
        }

        .cardTop {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: space-between;
          gap: 12px;
          margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .miniBrand {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .miniTitle {
          font-weight: 750;
          letter-spacing: 0.2px;
        }
        .miniSub {
          color: var(--muted2);
          font-size: 12.5px;
          margin-top: 2px;
        }

        .pill {
          font-size: 12px;
          color: var(--muted);
          padding: 8px 10px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
        }

        .mock {
          border-radius: 18px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
        }
        .mockBar {
          display: flex;
          gap: 8px;
          padding: 12px;
          border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
        }
        .mockBar span {
          width: 10px;
          height: 10px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
        }
        .mockBody {
          padding: 16px;
          display: grid;
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .mockLine {
          height: 10px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
        }
        .w70 { width: 70%; }
        .w55 { width: 55%; }
        .w85 { width: 85%; }
        .w60 { width: 60%; }
        .w40 { width: 40%; }

        .mockTiles {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 10px;
          margin: 6px 0;
        }
        .tile {
          height: 64px;
          border-radius: 16px;
          background: radial-gradient(
              120px 80px at 20% 10%,
              rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.25),
              transparent 60%
            ),
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        }

        .cardBottom {
          display: flex;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          gap: 8px;
          margin-top: 12px;
        }
        .badge {
          position: relative;
          overflow: hidden;
          padding: 10px 12px;
          border-radius: 999px;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
          color: var(--muted);
          font-size: 12.5px;
        }
        .badgeGlow {
          position: absolute;
          inset: -40px;
          background: radial-gradient(
            120px 90px at 20% 30%,
            rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18),
            transparent 60%
          );
          pointer-events: none;
        }

        .heroNote {
          color: var(--muted2);
          font-size: 12.5px;
          padding: 10px 12px;
          border-radius: 16px;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
        }

        .section {
          max-width: 1120px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          padding: 54px 18px;
        }

        .sectionHead {
          display: grid;
          gap: 8px;
          margin-bottom: 18px;
        }

        .h2 {
          font-size: 32px;
          letter-spacing: -0.6px;
          margin: 0;
        }

        .muted {
          color: var(--muted);
          margin: 0;
          line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .mutedSmall {
          color: var(--muted2);
          margin: 0;
          line-height: 1.5;
          font-size: 13px;
        }

        .cards {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 14px;
        }

        .card {
          padding: 18px;
          border-radius: var(--radius);
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
          box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
        }

        .card h3 {
          margin: 0 0 8px;
          letter-spacing: -0.3px;
        }
        .card p {
          margin: 0 0 10px;
          color: var(--muted);
          line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .card ul {
          margin: 0;
          padding-left: 18px;
          color: var(--muted2);
          display: grid;
          gap: 6px;
        }

        .split {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
          gap: 14px;
        }
        .panel {
          padding: 18px;
          border-radius: var(--radius);
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        }
        .glowPanel {
          background: radial-gradient(
              600px 280px at 20% 0%,
              rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.14),
              transparent 60%
            ),
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }
        .panel h3 {
          margin: 0 0 8px;
        }
        .panel p {
          margin: 0 0 12px;
          color: var(--muted);
          line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .ticks {
          display: grid;
          gap: 8px;
        }
        .tick {
          padding: 10px 12px;
          border-radius: 16px;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
          color: var(--muted2);
        }

        .steps {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 14px;
        }
        .step {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
          gap: 12px;
          padding: 18px;
          border-radius: var(--radius);
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        }
        .stepNum {
          font-weight: 800;
          letter-spacing: -0.5px;
          color: rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.90);
          text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18);
        }
        .stepBody h3 {
          margin: 0 0 6px;
        }
        .stepBody p {
          margin: 0;
          color: var(--muted);
          line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .pricing {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 14px;
        }
        .priceCard {
          padding: 18px;
          border-radius: var(--radius);
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        }
        .priceTop {
          margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        .price {
          font-size: 28px;
          font-weight: 850;
          letter-spacing: -0.6px;
          margin-top: 6px;
        }
        .priceCard ul {
          margin: 0;
          padding-left: 18px;
          color: var(--muted2);
          display: grid;
          gap: 6px;
        }
        .featured {
          background: radial-gradient(
              800px 380px at 40% 0%,
              rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18),
              transparent 60%
            ),
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
          border-color: rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.25);
          box-shadow: 0 20px 80px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.10);
        }

        .full {
          width: 100%;
          margin-top: 14px;
        }

        .note {
          color: var(--muted2);
          margin: 14px 0 0;
          font-size: 12.5px;
          line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .contact {
          padding-bottom: 70px;
        }
        .contactInner {
          padding: 22px;
          border-radius: calc(var(--radius) + 6px);
          background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rgba(255,255,255,0.04));
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
          box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }

        .contactGrid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
          gap: 14px;
          margin-top: 16px;
        }
        .contactCard {
          padding: 18px;
          border-radius: var(--radius);
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        }
        .emailPill {
          margin-top: 10px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          border-radius: 16px;
          border: 1px solid rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.30);
          background: rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.08);
          color: var(--text);
          font-weight: 650;
          letter-spacing: 0.2px;
        }
        .tiny {
          margin-top: 10px;
          color: var(--muted2);
          font-size: 12px;
          line-height: 1.5;
        }

        .footer {
          padding: 18px;
          border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
          background: rgba(7, 8, 11, 0.6);
          backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
        }
        .footerInner {
          max-width: 1120px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: space-between;
          gap: 14px;
          color: var(--muted2);
          font-size: 13px;
        }
        .footBrand {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          color: var(--text);
          font-weight: 650;
        }
        .footLinks {
          display: flex;
          gap: 14px;
        }
        .footLinks a {
          color: var(--muted2);
          text-decoration: none;
        }
        .footLinks a:hover {
          color: var(--text);
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
          .heroGrid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          }
          .h1 {
            font-size: 44px;
          }
          .cards,
          .steps,
          .pricing {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          }
          .split {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          }
          .heroStats {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          }
          .navLinks {
            display: none;
          }
          .contactGrid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

3) Why this is “Apple vibe” (and not corny)

  • Typography hierarchy is big + confident, but not messy.

  • Glass / blur is used lightly so it feels premium.

  • Orange only shows up where you want the eye to go (CTAs, highlights).

  • Parallax is subtle so it feels smooth, not like a theme from 2014.

4) Quick upgrades (if you want it even nastier)

If you tell me:

  1. what type of clients you want (gyms? finance firms? coaches? contractors?)

  2. if you want portfolio sections or just a lead-gen landing

  3. your exact pricing (or at least ranges)

…I’ll rewrite the hero copy + CTA flow so it’s way more intimidating and high-end, and we can add a “Case Studies” section that looks like an Apple product page.

If you want, paste your current Next.js folder structure (or your app/ directory) and I’ll fit this perfectly into what you already have so it doesn’t white-screen again.

You said:
i want a multi-paged site. can you help me develop the entire thing
ChatGPT said:

Yeah — and I’m gonna be opinionated here: multi-page is the move for Seifert Sites because it lets you rank on Google (SEO), look more legit, and it stops the “one-page freelancer” vibe.

Below is a complete multi-page site structure + code you can paste into a fresh Next.js app (App Router). It keeps the Apple-ish premium vibe, uses your parallax background globally, and gives you real pages: Home, Services, Work, Process, Pricing, Contact.

0) Folder structure (copy this exactly)

css
app/
  layout.tsx
  globals.css
  components/
    Background.tsx
    Nav.tsx
    Footer.tsx
    CTA.tsx
    Section.tsx
  page.tsx
  services/page.tsx
  work/page.tsx
  process/page.tsx
  pricing/page.tsx
  contact/page.tsx
public/
  logo.png
  bg.png

1) app/layout.tsx (global shell + nav + footer + background)

tsx
// app/layout.tsx
import "./globals.css";
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import Background from "./components/Background";
import Nav from "./components/Nav";
import Footer from "./components/Footer";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Seifert Sites — Web Design & Development",
  description:
    "Seifert Sites builds modern, high-performance websites with premium design, clean code, and conversion-first layouts.",
  icons: [{ rel: "icon", url: "/favicon.ico" }],
};

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body>
        <Background />
        <Nav />
        <main className="site">{children}</main>
        <Footer />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}

2) app/globals.css (the entire design system)

css
/* app/globals.css */
:root {
  --bg: #07080b;
  --panel: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  --panel2: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  --stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  --text: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  --muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68);
  --muted2: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.52);
  --orange: #ff7a1a;
  --orange2: #ff9a3d;
  --shadow: 0 20px 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
  --radius: 22px;
  --max: 1120px;
}

* { box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { height: 100%; }
body {
  margin: 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial;
}

a { color: inherit; }
.site { position: relative; z-index: 2; }

.container {
  max-width: var(--max);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 18px;
}

.h1 {
  font-size: 56px;
  line-height: 1.03;
  letter-spacing: -1.2px;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
}
.h2 {
  font-size: 34px;
  letter-spacing: -0.7px;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
}
.h3 {
  font-size: 18px;
  letter-spacing: -0.2px;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
}

.muted { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; }
.mutedSmall { color: var(--muted2); line-height: 1.55; margin: 0; font-size: 13px; }

.accent { color: var(--orange2); text-shadow: 0 0 26px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18); }

.btnRow { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 18px; }

.btnPrimary, .btnGhost {
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  font-weight: 650;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
}

.btnPrimary {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 122, 26, 1), rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.78));
  color: #0b0c10;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 55px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.22);
}
.btnPrimary:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); }

.btnGhost {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  color: var(--text);
}
.btnGhost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); }

.card {
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  background: var(--panel);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}

.grid3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; }
.grid2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 14px; }

.section { padding: 64px 0; }
.sectionTight { padding: 42px 0; }

.kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.kickerDot {
  width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--orange);
  box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.65);
}

.pageHero { padding: 88px 0 30px; }
.pageHero .muted { max-width: 68ch; }

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .h1 { font-size: 44px; }
  .grid3, .grid2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

3) Global parallax background: app/components/Background.tsx

tsx
// app/components/Background.tsx
"use client";

import Image from "next/image";
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";

function usePrefersReducedMotion() {
  const [reduced, setReduced] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    const mq = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)");
    const onChange = () => setReduced(mq.matches);
    onChange();
    mq.addEventListener?.("change", onChange);
    return () => mq.removeEventListener?.("change", onChange);
  }, []);
  return reduced;
}

export default function Background() {
  const prefersReducedMotion = usePrefersReducedMotion();
  const [scrollY, setScrollY] = useState(0);
  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onScroll = () => {
      if (rafRef.current) return;
      rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        setScrollY(window.scrollY || 0);
        rafRef.current = null;
      });
    };
    window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
    onScroll();
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("scroll", onScroll);
      if (rafRef.current) cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  const parallax = useMemo(() => {
    if (prefersReducedMotion) return 0;
    return Math.min(scrollY * 0.18, 160);
  }, [scrollY, prefersReducedMotion]);

  return (
    <div
      aria-hidden="true"
      style={{
        position: "fixed",
        inset: "-40px",
        zIndex: 0,
        willChange: "transform",
        transform: `translate3d(0, ${parallax}px, 0) scale(1.06)`,
        filter: "saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05)",
      }}
    >
      <Image
        src="/bg.png"
        alt=""
        fill
        priority
        sizes="100vw"
        style={{ objectFit: "cover" }}
      />
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          inset: 0,
          background:
            "radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 30% 0%, rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.12), transparent 55%)," +
            "radial-gradient(900px 500px at 80% 30%, rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.10), transparent 55%)," +
            "linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.65), rgba(0,0,0,0.82) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.92))",
        }}
      />
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          inset: 0,
          pointerEvents: "none",
          background:
            "radial-gradient(1200px 700px at 50% 20%, transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.55) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85))",
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

4) Nav + Footer components

app/components/Nav.tsx

tsx
// app/components/Nav.tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";

export default function Nav() {
  return (
    <header
      style={{
        position: "sticky",
        top: 0,
        zIndex: 50,
        backdropFilter: "blur(16px)",
        background: "rgba(7, 8, 11, 0.6)",
        borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
      }}
    >
      <div className="container" style={{ padding: "14px 18px" }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 16 }}>
          <Link href="/" style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, textDecoration: "none" }}>
            <div
              style={{
                width: 38,
                height: 38,
                display: "grid",
                placeItems: "center",
                borderRadius: 14,
                background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
                border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10)",
              }}
            >
              <Image src="/logo.png" alt="Seifert Sites" width={28} height={28} />
            </div>
            <span style={{ fontWeight: 650, letterSpacing: 0.2 }}>Seifert Sites</span>
          </Link>

          <nav className="navLinks" style={{ display: "flex", gap: 18 }}>
            <Link href="/services" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>
              Services
            </Link>
            <Link href="/work" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>
              Work
            </Link>
            <Link href="/process" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>
              Process
            </Link>
            <Link href="/pricing" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>
              Pricing
            </Link>
            <Link href="/contact" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>
              Contact
            </Link>
          </nav>

          <Link
            href="/contact"
            style={{
              textDecoration: "none",
              fontSize: 14,
              padding: "10px 14px",
              borderRadius: 999,
              border: "1px solid rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.35)",
              background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18), rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.06))",
              color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.92)",
            }}
          >
            Book a call
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>
  );
}

app/components/Footer.tsx

tsx
// app/components/Footer.tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";

export default function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer
      style={{
        padding: 18,
        borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        background: "rgba(7, 8, 11, 0.6)",
        backdropFilter: "blur(14px)",
        position: "relative",
        zIndex: 2,
      }}
    >
      <div className="container">
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 14, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, fontWeight: 650 }}>
            <Image src="/logo.png" alt="" width={22} height={22} />
            <span>Seifert Sites</span>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)" }}>
            <Link href="/services" style={{ textDecoration: "none" }}>Services</Link>
            <Link href="/process" style={{ textDecoration: "none" }}>Process</Link>
            <Link href="/pricing" style={{ textDecoration: "none" }}>Pricing</Link>
          </div>

          <div style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)", fontSize: 13 }}>
            © {new Date().getFullYear()} Seifert Sites
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

5) Small reusable blocks (CTA + Section wrapper)

app/components/CTA.tsx

tsx
// app/components/CTA.tsx
import Link from "next/link";

export default function CTA() {
  return (
    <section className="sectionTight">
      <div className="container">
        <div
          className="card"
          style={{
            background:
              "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rgba(255,255,255,0.04))",
            border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14)",
          }}
        >
          <h2 className="h2" style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>
            Ready to look premium overnight?
          </h2>
          <p className="muted">
            If your site feels “fine” right now… that’s the problem. Let’s make it feel inevitable.
          </p>
          <div className="btnRow">
            <Link className="btnPrimary" href="/contact">Book a call</Link>
            <Link className="btnGhost" href="/work">See work</Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

app/components/Section.tsx

tsx
// app/components/Section.tsx
export default function Section({
  title,
  subtitle,
  children,
}: {
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <section className="section">
      <div className="container">
        <h2 className="h2">{title}</h2>
        {subtitle ? <p className="muted">{subtitle}</p> : null}
        <div style={{ marginTop: 18 }}>{children}</div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

6) Pages

Home: app/page.tsx

tsx
// app/page.tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import CTA from "./components/CTA";
import Section from "./components/Section";

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <div className="kicker">
            <span className="kickerDot" />
            <span>Web design & development • dark premium • conversion-first</span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="h1">
            Websites that look expensive <span className="accent">and</span> sell.
          </h1>

          <p className="muted">
            Seifert Sites builds modern, fast, Apple-level clean websites for businesses that want
            to feel instantly trustworthy. No template energy. No clutter. Just confident design.
          </p>

          <div className="btnRow">
            <Link className="btnPrimary" href="/contact">Get a quote</Link>
            <Link className="btnGhost" href="/services">View services</Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <Section
        title="What I do"
        subtitle="A clean system: premium look, fast load, clear CTA."
      >
        <div className="grid3">
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Design + Build</div>
            <p className="muted">Custom UI, strong type, perfect spacing, smooth motion.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Redesigns</div>
            <p className="muted">If your site feels dated, I’ll redo it into something sharp.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">SEO + Launch</div>
            <p className="muted">Technical SEO, speed, tracking, and a real launch checklist.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Section>

      <Section
        title="The vibe"
        subtitle="Minimal, dark, aggressive-clean. Orange only where it matters."
      >
        <div className="grid2">
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Looks premium</div>
            <p className="muted">
              You get that “this business is legit” feeling the second it loads.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Built to convert</div>
            <p className="muted">
              People don’t scroll forever. We guide them with layout, proof, and CTAs.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Section>

      <CTA />
    </>
  );
}

Services: app/services/page.tsx

tsx
// app/services/page.tsx
import CTA from "../components/CTA";
import Section from "../components/Section";

export default function ServicesPage() {
  return (
    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <h1 className="h1">Services</h1>
          <p className="muted">
            Pick what you need. I’ll build it like it belongs on a billboard.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <Section title="Core services">
        <div className="grid3">
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Landing Pages</div>
            <p className="muted">Perfect for one offer: coaching, local services, campaigns.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Business Websites</div>
            <p className="muted">Multi-page structure, SEO pages, clean navigation, strong CTAs.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Redesigns</div>
            <p className="muted">Redo your site so it feels modern, premium, and clearer.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Section>

      <Section title="Add-ons">
        <div className="grid2">
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">SEO + Analytics</div>
            <p className="muted">Technical SEO, indexing, tracking, and performance.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="card">
            <div className="h3">Copy cleanup</div>
            <p className="muted">Rewrite sections so they hit harder and don’t sound generic.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Section>

      <CTA />
    </>
  );
}

Work: app/work/page.tsx

tsx
// app/work/page.tsx
import CTA from "../components/CTA";

export default function WorkPage() {
  return (
    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <h1 className="h1">Work</h1>
          <p className="muted">
            You’ll drop real case studies here. For now, this is a clean placeholder layout.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="section">
        <div className="container">
          <div className="grid3">
            {["Client Project A", "Client Project B", "Client Project C"].map((t) => (
              <div key={t} className="card">
                <div className="h3">{t}</div>
                <p className="mutedSmall">
                  Add a screenshot, what you built, and the result (leads, bookings, etc).
                </p>
                <div style={{ marginTop: 12, height: 120, borderRadius: 16, border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.18)" }} />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <CTA />
    </>
  );
}

// app/process/page.tsx
import CTA from "../components/CTA";

export default function ProcessPage() {

    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <h1 className="h1">Process</h1>
          <p className="muted">Fast, clean, no chaos. Here’s how we ship.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="section">
        <div className="container">
          <div className="grid3">
            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">01 — Strategy</div>
              <p className="muted">Goal, audience, offer, CTA. If this is fuzzy, the site is too.</p>
            </div>
            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">02 — Design</div>
              <p className="muted">Apple-ish layout, dark premium system, clear hierarchy.</p>
            </div>
            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">03 — Build + Launch</div>
              <p className="muted">Clean code, speed, SEO, analytics, and you’re live.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <CTA />
    </>
  );
}

Pricing: app/pricing/page.tsx

// app/pricing/page.tsx
import CTA from "../components/CTA";

export default function PricingPage() {
  return (
    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <h1 className="h1">Pricing</h1>
          <p className="muted">Simple tiers. Built for businesses that want to look legit.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="section">
        <div className="container">
          <div className="grid3">
            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">Starter</div>
              <p className="mutedSmall">One-page landing page</p>
              <ul style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)", marginTop: 10, display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
                <li>Hero + CTA + core sections</li>
                <li>Mobile-first</li>
                <li>Basic SEO</li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div className="card" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,122,26,0.25)" }}>
              <div className="h3">Business</div>
              <p className="mutedSmall">Multi-page site</p>
              <ul style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)", marginTop: 10, display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
                <li>3–6 pages</li>
                <li>Lead capture + tracking</li>
                <li>Speed optimization</li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">Premium</div>
              <p className="mutedSmall">Extra polish</p>
              <ul style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)", marginTop: 10, display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
                <li>Advanced motion</li>
                <li>Copy cleanup</li>
                <li>Priority turnaround</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>

          <p className="mutedSmall" style={{ marginTop: 14 }}>
            Replace tier descriptions with your actual pricing. If you tell me your numbers, I’ll word them so they feel premium.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <CTA />
    </>
  );
}

Contact: app/contact/page.tsx

tsx
// app/contact/page.tsx
export default function ContactPage() {
  return (
    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <h1 className="h1">Contact</h1>
          <p className="muted">
            Tell me what you do, what you sell, and what you want the site to achieve.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="section">
        <div className="container">
          <div className="grid2">
            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">Book a call</div>
              <p className="mutedSmall">
                Add your Calendly link here. This is the highest-converting option.
              </p>
              <a className="btnPrimary" href="#" style={{ marginTop: 14, width: "100%" }}>
                Add booking link
              </a>
            </div>

            <div className="card">
              <div className="h3">Email</div>
              <p className="mutedSmall">Prefer async? Email me:</p>
              <div
                style={{
                  marginTop: 10,
                  padding: "12px 14px",
                  borderRadius: 16,
                  border: "1px solid rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.30)",
                  background: "rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.08)",
                  fontWeight: 650,
                  letterSpacing: 0.2,
                }}
              >
                you@seifertsites.com
              </div>
              <p className="mutedSmall" style={{ marginTop: 10 }}>
                Swap this to your real email.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </>
  );
}

7) Run it

From the project folder:

bash
npm run dev

If you still ever get a white screen, it’s usually because:

  • you accidentally put React code in a server component without "use client" (fixed above), or

  • you created a file that isn’t exporting a default component (this code does).

What I need from you (so we can “finish” finish it)

No annoying interrogation, just these 3 quick things and I can fully tailor every page copy + structure:

  1. Your target client type (examples: gyms, contractors, finance firms, coaches, restaurants)

  2. Do you want portfolio/case studies or are you fine with “style examples” for now?

  3. How do you want leads to come in: Calendly, email, or form?

Reply with those, and I’ll:

  • write killer Apple-tier copy for every page,

  • add a clean contact form (no backend needed at first),

  • build a real “Work” case study template page,

  • and add SEO basics like metadata per page + sitemap/robots.

You said:
help me do this using powershell, vs code, and node.js
ChatGPT said:

Got you. Here’s the PowerShell + VS Code + Node.js way to build your Seifert Sites multi-page Next.js site from zero, with your logo + parallax background, and without the “white screen” nonsense.

1) Make a fresh project (PowerShell)

Open PowerShell (not CMD) and run:

powershell
# go somewhere you keep projects
cd C:\Users\lucas\Documents

# create next app
npx create-next-app@latest seifert-sites

# enter folder
cd seifert-sites

# open in VS Code
code .

When it asks questions in the terminal, pick these:

  • TypeScript? Yes

  • ESLint? Yes

  • Tailwind? No (we’re doing clean CSS ourselves)

  • App Router? Yes

  • src/ directory? No (keep it simple)

  • Turbopack? Yes (fine)

2) Add your images (VS Code)

In VS Code:

  • Put your logo image into: public\logo.png

  • Put your background image into: public\bg.png

(Exactly those names. No spaces. No weird imports.)

3) Create the folders/files (PowerShell)

Run this in the VS Code terminal (PowerShell):

powershell
# create folders
mkdir app\components
mkdir app\services
mkdir app\work
mkdir app\process
mkdir app\pricing
mkdir app\contact

# create files
ni app\layout.tsx -Force
ni app\globals.css -Force

ni app\components\Background.tsx -Force
ni app\components\Nav.tsx -Force
ni app\components\Footer.tsx -Force
ni app\components\CTA.tsx -Force
ni app\components\Section.tsx -Force

ni app\page.tsx -Force
ni app\services\page.tsx -Force
ni app\work\page.tsx -Force
ni app\process\page.tsx -Force
ni app\pricing\page.tsx -Force
ni app\contact\page.tsx -Force

4) Paste code into each file (VS Code)

Now in VS Code, open each file and paste the matching code.

app/layout.tsx

tsx
import "./globals.css";
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import Background from "./components/Background";
import Nav from "./components/Nav";
import Footer from "./components/Footer";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Seifert Sites — Web Design & Development",
  description:
    "Seifert Sites builds modern, high-performance websites with premium design, clean code, and conversion-first layouts.",
};

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body>
        <Background />
        <Nav />
        <main className="site">{children}</main>
        <Footer />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}

app/globals.css

css
:root {
  --bg: #07080b;
  --panel: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  --stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  --text: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  --muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68);
  --muted2: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.52);
  --orange: #ff7a1a;
  --orange2: #ff9a3d;
  --shadow: 0 20px 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
  --radius: 22px;
  --max: 1120px;
}

* { box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { height: 100%; }
body {
  margin: 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial;
}

a { color: inherit; }
.site { position: relative; z-index: 2; }

.container {
  max-width: var(--max);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 18px;
}

.h1 { font-size: 56px; line-height: 1.03; letter-spacing: -1.2px; margin: 0 0 14px; }
.h2 { font-size: 34px; letter-spacing: -0.7px; margin: 0 0 10px; }
.h3 { font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: -0.2px; margin: 0 0 8px; }

.muted { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; }
.mutedSmall { color: var(--muted2); line-height: 1.55; margin: 0; font-size: 13px; }

.accent { color: var(--orange2); text-shadow: 0 0 26px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18); }

.btnRow { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 18px; }
.btnPrimary, .btnGhost {
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  font-weight: 650;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
}
.btnPrimary {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 122, 26, 1), rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.78));
  color: #0b0c10;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 55px rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.22);
}
.btnPrimary:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); }
.btnGhost {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  color: var(--text);
}
.btnGhost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); }

.card {
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  background: var(--panel);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}
.grid3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; }
.grid2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 14px; }

.section { padding: 64px 0; }
.sectionTight { padding: 42px 0; }
.pageHero { padding: 88px 0 30px; }
.pageHero .muted { max-width: 68ch; }

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .h1 { font-size: 44px; }
  .grid3, .grid2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

app/components/Background.tsx (parallax)

tsx
"use client";

import Image from "next/image";
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";

function usePrefersReducedMotion() {
  const [reduced, setReduced] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    const mq = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)");
    const onChange = () => setReduced(mq.matches);
    onChange();
    mq.addEventListener?.("change", onChange);
    return () => mq.removeEventListener?.("change", onChange);
  }, []);
  return reduced;
}

export default function Background() {
  const prefersReducedMotion = usePrefersReducedMotion();
  const [scrollY, setScrollY] = useState(0);
  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onScroll = () => {
      if (rafRef.current) return;
      rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        setScrollY(window.scrollY || 0);
        rafRef.current = null;
      });
    };
    window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
    onScroll();
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("scroll", onScroll);
      if (rafRef.current) cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  const parallax = useMemo(() => {
    if (prefersReducedMotion) return 0;
    return Math.min(scrollY * 0.18, 160);
  }, [scrollY, prefersReducedMotion]);

  return (
    <div
      aria-hidden="true"
      style={{
        position: "fixed",
        inset: "-40px",
        zIndex: 0,
        willChange: "transform",
        transform: `translate3d(0, ${parallax}px, 0) scale(1.06)`,
        filter: "saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05)",
      }}
    >
      <Image
        src="/bg.png"
        alt=""
        fill
        priority
        sizes="100vw"
        style={{ objectFit: "cover" }}
      />
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          inset: 0,
          background:
            "radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 30% 0%, rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.12), transparent 55%)," +
            "radial-gradient(900px 500px at 80% 30%, rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.10), transparent 55%)," +
            "linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.65), rgba(0,0,0,0.82) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.92))",
        }}
      />
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          inset: 0,
          pointerEvents: "none",
          background:
            "radial-gradient(1200px 700px at 50% 20%, transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.55) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85))",
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

app/components/Nav.tsx

tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";

export default function Nav() {
  return (
    <header
      style={{
        position: "sticky",
        top: 0,
        zIndex: 50,
        backdropFilter: "blur(16px)",
        background: "rgba(7, 8, 11, 0.6)",
        borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
      }}
    >
      <div className="container" style={{ paddingTop: 14, paddingBottom: 14 }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 16 }}>
          <Link href="/" style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, textDecoration: "none" }}>
            <div
              style={{
                width: 38,
                height: 38,
                display: "grid",
                placeItems: "center",
                borderRadius: 14,
                background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
                border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10)",
              }}
            >
              <Image src="/logo.png" alt="Seifert Sites" width={28} height={28} />
            </div>
            <span style={{ fontWeight: 650 }}>Seifert Sites</span>
          </Link>

          <nav style={{ display: "flex", gap: 18, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            <Link href="/services" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>Services</Link>
            <Link href="/work" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>Work</Link>
            <Link href="/process" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>Process</Link>
            <Link href="/pricing" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>Pricing</Link>
            <Link href="/contact" style={{ textDecoration: "none", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 14 }}>Contact</Link>
          </nav>

          <Link
            href="/contact"
            style={{
              textDecoration: "none",
              fontSize: 14,
              padding: "10px 14px",
              borderRadius: 999,
              border: "1px solid rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.35)",
              background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.18), rgba(255, 122, 26, 0.06))",
              color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.92)",
            }}
          >
            Book a call
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>
  );
}

app/components/Footer.tsx

tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import Image from "next/image";

export default function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer
      style={{
        padding: 18,
        borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        background: "rgba(7, 8, 11, 0.6)",
        backdropFilter: "blur(14px)",
        position: "relative",
        zIndex: 2,
      }}
    >
      <div className="container">
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 14, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, fontWeight: 650 }}>
            <Image src="/logo.png" alt="" width={22} height={22} />
            <span>Seifert Sites</span>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)" }}>
            <Link href="/services" style={{ textDecoration: "none" }}>Services</Link>
            <Link href="/process" style={{ textDecoration: "none" }}>Process</Link>
            <Link href="/pricing" style={{ textDecoration: "none" }}>Pricing</Link>
          </div>

          <div style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.52)", fontSize: 13 }}>
            © {new Date().getFullYear()} Seifert Sites
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

app/components/CTA.tsx

tsx
import Link from "next/link";

export default function CTA() {
  return (
    <section className="sectionTight">
      <div className="container">
        <div
          className="card"
          style={{
            background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rgba(255,255,255,0.04))",
            border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14)",
          }}
        >
          <h2 className="h2" style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>Ready to look premium?</h2>
          <p className="muted">Let’s build something that feels inevitable.</p>
          <div className="btnRow">
            <Link className="btnPrimary" href="/contact">Book a call</Link>
            <Link className="btnGhost" href="/work">See work</Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

app/components/Section.tsx

tsx
export default function Section({
  title,
  subtitle,
  children,
}: {
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <section className="section">
      <div className="container">
        <h2 className="h2">{title}</h2>
        {subtitle ? <p className="muted">{subtitle}</p> : null}
        <div style={{ marginTop: 18 }}>{children}</div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

5) Pages (minimal but working)

app/page.tsx

tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import CTA from "./components/CTA";
import Section from "./components/Section";

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <>
      <section className="pageHero">
        <div className="container">
          <div className="kicker" style={{ display: "inline-flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", padding: "10px 14px", borderRadius: 999, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", fontSize: 13, marginBottom: 18 }}>
            <span style={{ width: 9, height: 9, borderRadius: 999, background: "var(--orange)", boxShadow: "0 0 18px rgba(255,122,26,0.65)" }} />
            <span>Web design & development • dark premium • conversion-first</span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="h1">
            Websites that look expensive <span className="accent">and</span> sell.
          </h1>
          <p className="muted">
            Seifert Sites builds modern, fast, Apple-level clean websites for businesses that want to feel instantly trustworthy.
          </p>

          <div className="btnRow">
            <Link className="btnPrimary" href="/contact">Get a quote</Link>
            <Link className="btnGhost" href="/services">View services</Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <Section title="What I do" subtitle="Premium look, fast load, clear CTA.">
        <div className="grid3">
          <div className="card"><div className="h3">Design + Build</div><p className="muted">Custom UI, strong type, smooth motion.</p></div>
          <div className="card"><div className="h3">Redesigns</div><p className="muted">Redo your site so it feels sharp.</p></div>
          <div className="card"><div className="h3">SEO + Launch</div><p className="muted">Technical SEO, speed, tracking.</p></div>
        </div>
      </Section>

      <CTA />
    </>
  );
}

The other pages (copy/paste, same pattern)

If you want, I’ll paste all five remaining page files too, but this message is already chunky.

6) Run the site (PowerShell)

powershell
npm run dev

Open:

  • http://localhost:3000

Bonus: “white screen” fixes (PowerShell + sanity checks)

Check you’re in the right folder:

powershell
pwd
ls

You should see app, public, package.json.

Nuke caches if anything acts possessed:

powershell
# stop dev server first (Ctrl+C)
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next
npm run dev

Tell me ONE thing and I’ll finish the entire multi-page build in the same style

Do you want these pages to be:

  • /work = real case studies (screenshots + results + “before/after”)
    or

  • /work = “style gallery” until you have clients?

Reply with that and I’ll drop the full remaining page files + a legit case-study template page you can reuse per client.

You said:
how do i do step 3
ChatGPT said:

Step 3 is just making the folders + empty files from PowerShell so you can paste code into them in VS Code.

Here’s exactly how to do it (clean + idiot-proof).

✅ Step 3 (PowerShell) — create folders + files

1) Open the VS Code terminal

In VS Code: Terminal → New Terminal
Make sure the dropdown says PowerShell.

2) Make sure you’re inside your project folder

Run:

powershell
pwd

You should see something like:
...\seifert-sites

Also confirm you see package.json:

powershell
ls

If you don’t see package.json, go into the project:

powershell
cd .\seifert-sites

3) Create the folders

Copy/paste this whole block:

powershell
mkdir app\components -Force
mkdir app\services -Force
mkdir app\work -Force
mkdir app\process -Force
mkdir app\pricing -Force
mkdir app\contact -Force

4) Create the empty files

Copy/paste this block:

powershell
ni app\layout.tsx -Force
ni app\globals.css -Force

ni app\components\Background.tsx -Force
ni app\components\Nav.tsx -Force
ni app\components\Footer.tsx -Force
ni app\components\CTA.tsx -Force
ni app\components\Section.tsx -Force

ni app\page.tsx -Force
ni app\services\page.tsx -Force
ni app\work\page.tsx -Force
ni app\process\page.tsx -Force
ni app\pricing\page.tsx -Force
ni app\contact\page.tsx -Force

That’s it — now VS Code will show those folders/files in the left sidebar.

If PowerShell says “already exists”

That’s fine. The -Force flag means “don’t complain.”

If it errors (common issues)

“mkdir : Cannot find path ‘app\…’”

You’re not inside the Next.js project folder. Fix:

powershell
cd .\seifert-sites

“ni is not recognized”

Super rare, but if it happens, use this instead:

powershell
New-Item -ItemType File -Path app\layout.tsx -Force

If you paste what your terminal shows after you run pwd + ls, I can tell you instantly if you’re in the wrong directory.

ChatGPT said:

Perfect — you did Step 3 correctly. Like, textbook. Nothing is broken. You’re exactly where you should be. ✅
Now let me tell you what’s next and what NOT to do, because this is where most people accidentally nuke their project.

🔴 Important thing you did (and didn’t realize)

Your Next.js app was created with Tailwind enabled (app-tw template).

That means:

  • There is already an existing app/layout.tsx and app/page.tsx that Next generated

  • You just overwrote them with empty files (which is fine)

  • BUT you must now replace them with our versions, or you’ll get a white screen

So the next step is not PowerShell anymore
👉 It’s VS Code copy & paste, in a specific order

✅ Step 4 — Paste code in the RIGHT order (VS Code)

1️⃣ Open app/layout.tsx

Paste this entire file (replace everything):

tsx
import "./globals.css";
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import Background from "./components/Background";
import Nav from "./components/Nav";
import Footer from "./components/Footer";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Seifert Sites — Web Design & Development",
  description:
    "Seifert Sites builds modern, high-performance websites with premium design and clean code.",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body>
        <Background />
        <Nav />
        <main className="site">{children}</main>
        <Footer />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}

Save the file (Ctrl + S).

2️⃣ Open app/globals.css

Paste everything from the globals.css I gave you earlier.

⚠️ IMPORTANT
Since Tailwind is installed, delete these lines if they exist:

css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

We are not using Tailwind. Leaving those in = styling conflicts.

Save.

3️⃣ Paste the components (order matters less here)

Do these one by one:

FilePaste
app/components/Background.tsxParallax background code
app/components/Nav.tsxNavigation code
app/components/Footer.tsxFooter code
app/components/CTA.tsxCTA block
app/components/Section.tsxSection wrapper

Each file:

  • Paste

  • Save

  • No red squiggles = good

4️⃣ Paste the pages

Now the routing pages:

PageFile
Homeapp/page.tsx
Servicesapp/services/page.tsx
Workapp/work/page.tsx
Processapp/process/page.tsx
Pricingapp/pricing/page.tsx
Contactapp/contact/page.tsx

Each one must:

  • export default function PageName() { ... }

  • No missing imports

  • No "use client" unless explicitly included

🚀 Step 5 — Run the site (PowerShell)

Back in the terminal:

powershell
npm run dev

Then open:

arduino
http://localhost:3000

You should see:

  • Dark geometric background

  • Sticky nav with logo

  • Multi-page routing works (/services, /pricing, etc.)

  • No white screen

🧯 If you DO get a white screen

Do this immediately:

powershell
# stop server (Ctrl + C first)
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next
npm run dev

If it still whitescreens, open VS Code → Problems tab and paste the first error line here. I’ll fix it in one message.

🔥 One more IMPORTANT cleanup (Tailwind)

Since you’re not using Tailwind, do this once:

Open tailwind.config.ts

Replace contents with:

ts
export default {}

Or delete the file entirely (safe).

Where you are now (reality check)

You’ve already done the hardest part:

  • Node installed ✔

  • Next app created ✔

  • App Router structure correct ✔

  • Files created correctly ✔

From here on, it’s just pasting clean code and polishing.

Tell me ONE thing before we continue:

Do you want:

  • a contact form (Netlify / Formspree / server action)

  • or Calendly-only leads?

Answer that, and I’ll wire the final production-ready pieces so this thing is actually client-ready, not just pretty.
